channel.title: Posts on hexfusion - Sam Batschelet
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on hexfusion - Sam Batschelet

item.title: Disaggregated Prefill/Decode on Consumer GPUs
item.description: Running llm-d’s disaggregated prefill/decode architecture across an RTX 3060 and a Tesla T4 connected by 25GbE RDMA. What worked, what broke, and what I learned about KV cache transfer at the edge of what consumer hardware can do.
